"vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [], "description": "## Summary
Trusted-proxy Control UI sessions without device identity could retain self-declared privileged scopes on the device-less allow path.

## Affected Packages / Versions
- Package: `openclaw` (npm)
- Affected: < 2026.3.22
- Fixed: >= 2026.3.22
- Latest released tag checked: `v2026.3.23-2` (`630f1479c44f78484dfa21bb407cbe6f171dac87`)
- Latest published npm version checked: `2026.3.23-2`

## Fix Commit(s)
- `ccf16cd8892402022439346ae1d23352e3707e9e`

## Release Status
The fix shipped in `v2026.3.22` and remains present in `v2026.3.23` and `v2026.3.23-2`.

## Code-Level Confirmation
- src/gateway/server/ws-connection/message-handler.ts now strips unbound self-declared scopes on the trusted-proxy no-device path.
- src/gateway/server/ws-connection/connect-policy.ts remains the allow path, but the shipped scope scrub prevents privilege retention without device identity.

OpenClaw thanks @nexrin for reporting.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-48vw-m3qc-wr99", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-03-26T19:50:59Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-48vw-m3qc-wr99", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-48vw-m3qc-wr99"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-03-26T19:50:59Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-48vw-m3qc-wr99", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/ccf16cd8892402022439346ae1d23352e3707e9e", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-48vw-m3qc-wr99"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-48vw-m3qc-wr99", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw's Trusted-proxy Control UI sessions retain privileged scopes without device identity on device-less allow paths", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-22T02:12:36Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-48vw-m3qc-wr99", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.3.22", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.3.22"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenClaw's Trusted-proxy Control UI sessions retain privileged scopes without device identity on device-less allow paths
